rationale: The previous attempt's assert-forall blocks had ambiguous auto-triggers; here we first re-assert each per-run ensures-forall with an explicit single trigger so they materialize cleanly on the skolem ptr, then assert the pointwise cross-run equality with a multi-trigger on both get_* calls. The container case splits on c_ptr == container_ptr and chains field-by-field through pre_self_ for the on-target case.
